title: Art exhibition will support worthy animal welfare cause
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Don't miss an exciting...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Don't miss an exciting exhibition by four of our top local artists, taking place from 4 to 7 December in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Don't miss an exciting exhibition by four of our top local artists, taking place from 4 to 7 December in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A portion of the proceeds from each art sale will go to the Caws 4 Paws animal welfare charity, so you will be supporting a worthy cause."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The artists are ceramicist and jewellery maker Minda du Plessis, painter Lynda Murison, fabric artist and jewellery maker Annemarie le Roux and glass artist Zandra Klapwijk.","html":"The artists are ceramicist and jewellery maker Minda du Plessis, painter Lynda Murison, fabric artist and jewellery maker Annemarie le Roux and glass artist Zandra Klapwijk."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery of the types of works that will be on display by clicking on the red text below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Art exhibition will support NPO which helps animals in need","html":"Art exhibition will support NPO which helps animals in need"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The exhibition takes place at 1 Kapokbos Street, Village on Sea, Heiderand."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The opening is on 4 December from 17:00 to 20:00 and after that the exhibition times are: 5 to 7 December, 10:00 to 18:00.","html":"The opening is on 4 December from 17:00 to 20:00 and after that the exhibition times are: 5 to 7 December, 10:00 to 18:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact Minda (083 457 3262) or Lynda (072 291 5541).","html":"For more information, contact Minda (083 457 3262) or Lynda (072 291 5541)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Art exhibition will support worthy animal welfare cause
